alignments.candidate_evidence: Eight years at Google Devices & Services with two promotions in Strategy & Operations; demonstrated experience scaling global commercial operations and transformation programs
alignments.job_requirement: Strategy & Operations role in Commercial domain with multi-location scope (Sydney/Singapore/London)

alignments.candidate_evidence: Managed territory budgets in Salesforce; partnered with engineering on feature requests and CRM administration; background in commercial operations scalable to revenue operations context
alignments.job_requirement: Commercial operations, territory management, and revenue discipline

alignments.candidate_evidence: Proficient in SQL (joins, GROUP BY, subqueries, window functions); writes BigQuery queries to pull and shape data; builds Looker dashboards; advanced Excel and Sheets
Eight years scaling global transformation programs; demonstrated ownership of requirements, logic design, UAT, rollout, and change execution
alignments.job_requirement: Transformation program execution and cross-functional stakeholder management

alignments.candidate_evidence: Designs, specs, and directs LLM coding agents to build production systems; owns evaluation methodology, benchmarking, and calibration for agentic-tooling; demonstrates capability to drive systematic improvement

gaps.gap: Limited explicit consulting or case-team experience in external strategy firms; classic case interview and pitch background not evident
gaps.mitigation: Eight years of applied strategy and operations at scale at Google; internal transformation and commercial program execution translates directly to problem-solving rigor expected in Commercial S&O roles

gaps.gap: JD lacks explicit detail on specific scope, reporting line, team size, or seniority signals beyond title
gaps.mitigation: Role title and department (Strategy & Operations at Google) suggest L4–L5 IC or manager scope; candidate's eight years, promotions, and program-ownership background position them competitively within typical S&O band

gaps.gap: Python remains basic and actively learning; agentic-tooling ownership is designs, specs, and direction rather than native Python engineering
gaps.mitigation: Role is Commercial S&O, not a production ML or software-engineering position; candidate's agentic-tooling direction and evaluation methodology is strategic asset, not code-writing requirement

output.level_rationale: Role title "Commercial Strategy & Operations" at Google with multi-location scope (Sydney/Singapore/London, role-dependent) and Strategy & Operations department suggests established L5 IC or manager-track role. No explicit years-required, reporting line, or team-size signal in truncated JD limits confidence. Estimated L5 based on: title scope (Commercial, not junior analyst), company size (Google), and typical S&O career progression (6–9 years or established senior-IC ownership). Company size/stage listed as unknown.
output.summary: Strong fit for a Commercial Strategy & Operations role at Google. Candidate brings eight years of demonstrated Google S&O experience, two promotions, and proven ability to scale global commercial operations and transformation programs. Strengths include SQL/BigQuery/dashboard analytics, territory-budget and Salesforce administration, and agentic-tooling direction. Gaps are light: no explicit consulting brand and basic Python (neither disqualifying for an S&O role). JD truncation limits confidence in exact scope and reporting structure, but title and department alignment are clear.
uncertainties: JD truncated before full responsibilities, reporting line, team size, or explicit seniority signals are visible; cannot confirm whether role expects manager scope
Company size/stage noted as 'unknown_unless_stated_in_jd'; cannot calibrate role level against startup-exception patterns

Specific Commercial S&O domain focus (GTM, pricing, territory, revenue operations, or business transformation) unclear from title alone; candidate's commercial operations experience may require slight domain translation
